---
title: "PhD Mentorship <span style='color: #aeaeae;'>and</span> <br>Gender Representation <span style='color: #aeaeae;'>in</span> <br>Academic Mathematics"  
subtitle: "CU Boulder Applied Math Seminar <br> April 16th, 2026"  
date: ""
author: '<span class="speaker-highlight">Phil Chodrow</span> <br>Department of Computer Science<br>Middlebury College'    
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-opacity: "0.0"  
  data-background-color: "#3a2d4b"  
---

## Test slide

bleh blah blarh
